description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected rooms, each distinctly colored, and a central greenhouse or sunroom with a glass dome roof. The exterior walls are clad in light stone, while large windows and French doors provide ample natural light and views into the interior. The house includes a spacious backyard area with a patio, outdoor seating, and lush landscaping, as well as a fenced perimeter for privacy. The roofline is mostly flat with some gentle slopes, and the greenhouse structure stands out as a unique architectural element. The interior is divided into several living spaces, bedrooms, and utility rooms, all visible through the open plan and transparent walls. Decorative elements such as potted plants, bookshelves, and colorful furnishings add to the home's inviting and modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a central glass greenhouse, stone exterior, large windows, and a landscaped backyard patio. The open-plan interior is colorful and well-lit, with multiple living spaces and decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the central greenhouse structure, with a clear view into the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard patio, outdoor seating, and the glass greenhouse, with visible garden landscaping and room divisions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, greenhouse, and outdoor living area, with the house's flat roof and multiple windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional rooms, large windows, and the continuation of the stone exterior, with a partial view of the backyard and greenhouse.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and French doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double doors, wide steps, and large glass panels, flanked by stone walls and decorative landscaping
